figure.title: Switch Port Loopback / Isolation
figure.purpose: Illustrates a loopback or isolation configuration within a Switch port's UPLI components.

technical_summary: Shows two Accelerators (ACC A and ACC B) connected via a central Switch.
The UPLI Originator and UPLI Completer blocks on one port of the Switch Core are highlighted.
A loopback symbol (purple circular arrow) indicates data being turned around at the UPLI layer within the Switch.

critical_facts: Switches can loop back traffic at the UPLI layer for diagnostic or isolation purposes.
